THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROGERS, JASON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1556A HOWARD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $9,438.10 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,438.10, STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-1995, LEASE FORFEITED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELLA, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT BELARDE, DENISE PATTERSON, BEN DRAGOS, CHRISTIAN JONES, SUSAN ROGERS, JASON DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, TONY VELLA, SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 1556A HOWARD, SAN FRANCISCO AND JUDGMENT FOR $9, 438.10. DEFENDANT, JASON ROBERTS, HAS WAIVED THE RIGHT TO HAVE HIS SECURITY DEPOSIT RETURNED. HE HAS ALSO WAIVED THE RIGHT TO ANY FURTHER STAYS OF EVICTION. THE TENANCY AGREEMENT IN THIS MATTER HAS BEEN FORFEITED. JASON ROBERTS IS THE SOLE OCCUPANT OF THESE PREMISES OTHER THAN FORMER TENANTS WHO HAVE DEFAULTED. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE BUT SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 6-30-95, 5PM. IF DEFENDANT, JASON ROBERTS, PERFORMS ALL THE TERMS OF THIS SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED ALONG WITH ANY MONEY CLAIMS.
